2278190.name: The Resurrection of Naxa
2278190.description:
Take part in the grand adventure you've been training your whole life for. Set out from your home with nothing more than a sword and a map, find the lost Naxa Crystals and defeat the evil lurking behind every corner.

Find companions to join you in your quest. Help all those you find, or ignore them. Choose to spare or slay those who oppose you in your quest.

Traverse settlements all over the world, finding strange and mysterious races and peoples. Most importantly, temper your resolve to become strong enough to save the world!
2278190.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
